subject: 3 things your top competitors do differently on Black Friday
body:
Hi [Name],

Noticed [Company] ran a flat 20% discount during Black Friday — it works, but it's leaving money on the table compared to dynamic pricing strategies.

Top e-commerce brands using personalized offers see 2.3x higher revenue per visitor during peak events — same traffic, different approach.

[Product] runs dynamic promotions based on user behavior and inventory. Setup takes one afternoon, no dev needed.

Want me to show you a quick before/after from a similar store?
why_it_works: specific observation + competitor comparison + data + zero-friction offer
